question.label: Mentoring useful
question.name: Mentoring feels useful — what is it giving you right now?
question.description: Follows the mentoring thread to surface what need or gap it is meeting underneath the recent shift.

answer: I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.

assessment.note: He explicitly doubts whether his current work is the kind that gets recognized, signalling both stalled growth and unclear success criteria.

new_queue.label: Recognized work
new_queue.name: What kind of work do you believe gets recognized here?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
